en: Good morning. I need to go to the airport, please.
Good morning! Sure, I'll be happy to take you there.
ko: 좋은 아침이에요! 네, 기꺼이 모셔다 드리겠습니다.

en: Which airport are you flying from? I'm flying from the international airport.
It's about a 45-minute drive from here.
Noted. We'll make sure you get there on time. Do you have any specific airline or terminal?
ko: 알겠습니다. 정시에 도착하실 수 있도록 하겠습니다. 특정 항공사나 터미널이 있으신가요?
